title: Scheduled posts do not emit streaming events
description: In delivery.rs create_scheduled_post (line 396), newly created posts from the scheduled_statuses queue never call publish(StreamEvent{...}). The regular create_status path (posting.rs:1374-1384) publishes to both 'public' and 'user:{account_id}' channels. Connected streaming clients (including Mastodon-compatible mobile apps) won't see scheduled posts appear in real-time when they fire. Users must manually refresh to see their own scheduled posts. This is a second gap in the scheduled post path (alongside the missing search index update filed separately).
